author: śrīla rūpa gosvāmī
verses:
rādhe jaya jaya mādhava⋅dayite
gokula⋅taruṇīmaṇḍala⋅mahite

dāmodara⋅rativardhana⋅veśe
hari⋅niṣkuṭa⋅vṛndāvipineśe

vṛṣabhānudadhi⋅navaśaśilekhe
lalitā-sakhi guṇaramita⋅viśākhe

karuṇāṁ kuru mayi karuṇā⋅bharite
sanaka⋅sanātana⋅varṇita⋅carite
en_translation:
Rādhe, all glories to You, beloved of Mādhava, O worshiped by the circle of young women of Gokula.

Whose attire increases the love of Dāmodara, O queen of Hari's pleasure-groves in Vṛndāvana.

O new crescent moon in the ocean of Vṛṣabhānu's family, O friend of Lalitā, whose qualities delight Viśākhā.

O full of mercy, please bestow mercy upon me, Whose character is described by Sanaka and Sanātana.
